title: Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Quality Control Engineer for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd!
